Class UserInfo

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.util.UserInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UserInfo extends Object implements Serializable
Data about the current logged user, obtained via Users.

Author:
Javier Paniza, Yerik AlarcÃ³n
